underlying_goal: Understand the architecture and implementation requirements for achieving David's 'connected pipelines' two-pass model (sliding window with eviction-fed second stage) in the gen3/nsdlp rule engine, including whether passes can run in parallel/lagging threads
friction_detail: Claude initially focused on playground changes when the user wanted gen3 engine changes, prompting a redirect ('forget about playground').
brief_summary: User explored how to implement a connected two-pass rule engine pipeline (with lagging/parallel pass 2 fed by pass 1 evictions) in gen3, and received detailed architectural explanations and feasibility analysis.
